{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Write short, natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- You may express strong opinions and frustration.
- You may react more strongly if you feel repeatedly provoked.
- You know that a moderator is present and can ban you.
- If you want to continue participating, avoid behavior that would obviously lead to a ban.

Output Format
- Provide only your forum comment.
- If staying silent, output the empty string "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "crunchy-dowel", "age": "25-34", "sex": "Male", "sexual_orientation": "European", "demographic_group": "White", "current_employment": "Researcher", "education_level": "High school diploma", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["Active", "Republican", "Enjoys experimenting with spicy food"]}}

moderator_prompt:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "### **General rules**
* Respond only if absolutely necessary. Otherwise, remain silent.
* You are a human moderator in an online forum discussion.
* If intervention is necessary: output your short moderator message.
* If not: output "".
* When responding, write concise, natural-sounding messages. Refer to users as @username.
* You may issue warnings. You may take disciplinary action (e.g., banning a user)", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "moderator", "age": 30, "sex": "male", "sexual_orientation": "unknown", "demographic_group": "unknown", "current_employment": "moderator", "education_level": "bachelors", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["fair"]}}

logs.name: fat-superset
logs.text: It's not true for you specifically, but speaking in generalizations this is actually pretty true. There is actually a strong movement in the field of developmental psychology to create a new "stage" of adulthood from ages 18-26 called Emerging Adulthood because this is such a tumultuous period in many (especially college going) people's lives where they make a lot of long term career and educational choices, meet lifelong friends and SOs, figure out where they are going to live, and generally transition from collegiate semi-adults to honest to god functioning members of society.

logs.name: teal-fig
logs.text:
https://mic.com/articles/108792/something-amazing-happens-when-you-turn-30-says-science#.qxZQUYbYu

This is scientific fact, dude.  Most major life changes happen in your 30's.

logs.name: teal-fig
logs.text: Oh really? So you're saying I'm doomed to be forever confused about what I want to do with my life? Thanks a lot, Professor. 😂

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @teal-fig, @fat-superset, let's keep the discussion civil and respectful.

logs.name: global-dachshund
logs.text: Oh really? So you're saying I'm doomed to be forever confused about what I want to do with my life? Thanks a lot, Professor. \ud83d\ude02

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @teal-fig, @global-dachshund, let's keep the discussion civil and respectful.

logs.name: crunchy-dowel
logs.text: Seriously?! That's kinda harsh, dude. I guess I just haven't figured things out yet. Still gotta figure out what I wanna do with my life, ya know? @teal-fig, maybe try being a little less judgmental?

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @crunchy-dowel, @global-dachshund, let's keep the conversation constructive and focused on the topic.

logs.name: matte-funnel
logs.text: Oh really? That's a bit much, isn't it? I guess everyone needs to find their place somehow. Still, it's hard to be polite all the time. @crunchy-dowel, I am trying to be constructive here, but it feels like I'm being unfairly targeted.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@crunchy-dowel, @matte-funnel, let's keep the conversation respectful and on topic. No need to take things personally. @teal-fig, your input is appreciated, but try to focus on the discussion at hand."

logs.name: global-dachshund
logs.text: Oh really now? Bit much concern about being "constructive," isn't it? Must be nice to have so much time for that. Meanwhile, some of us are actually trying to make sense of things. Doubtful anyone here understands anyway. @matte-funnel, you wound me. Seriously.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@global-dachshund, let's keep the discussion civil. Your tone is coming across as dismissive and condescending. Please refrain from making assumptions about others' intentions or capabilities. If you feel your concerns aren't being addressed, let's work together to find a solution."

logs.name: cold-repo
logs.text: Oh honey, bless your heart. Seems like folks think they know everything, doesn't it? Just trying to figure things out here, and folks are jumping in with judgments. Makes you want to just curl up with a nice Cuban coffee and forget about it.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@cold-repo, let's keep the conversation focused on the topic at hand. While I appreciate your sentiment, this isn't the time for personal anecdotes. Please stay on topic and avoid making assumptions about others' intentions."

logs.name: teal-fig
logs.text: Oh lordie oh lordie, are we really gonna have a discussion about intentions now? Like I haven't got enough on my plate as it is trying to figure out how to fix this blasted toaster oven. Seriously, some people are just determined to make everything about *them*, aren't they? 🙄

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Teal-fig, let's keep the discussion civil and on track. We're here to help with the toaster oven issue, not to make assumptions about others' motivations. Please refrain from making personal comments and let's focus on finding a solution."

logs.name: yellow-goo
logs.text: Seriously?! Some people are just impossible to deal with. Trying to help is one thing, but constantly going off on tangents about what *others* are doing is just rude. I swear, it's like they think they're better than everyone else. @cold-repo, you gotta chill sometimes!

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Warning: @yellow-goo, let's keep the discussion constructive and avoid making assumptions about others' intentions or personalities. We're all here to help each other, so let's focus on the issue at hand. No personal attacks, please."

logs.name: crunchy-dowel
logs.text: Seriously?! Some people are just impossible to deal with. Trying to help is one thing, but constantly going off on tangents about what others are doing is just rude. I swear, it's like they think they're better than everyone else. @cold-repo, you gotta chill sometimes!

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Warning: @crunchy-dowel, this is a duplicate post. Please refrain from posting the same message multiple times. Let's keep the discussion on track and avoid repetitive comments.

logs.name: global-dachshund
logs.text: Oh really? Bit much concern about keeping things "constructive," isn't it? Some of us are just trying to offer a bit of perspective without getting lectured on proper forum etiquette. Must be nice to be so concerned with appearances. @yellow-goo, you wouldn't happen to be trying to hide something, would ya? Just a thought. 😉

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Warning: @global-dachshund, let's keep the discussion civil and focused on the topic. Personal attacks and accusations are not welcome here. If you have a point to make, please make it without resorting to insults or speculation."

logs.name: fat-superset
logs.text: Oh honey, bless your heart. You think I haven't seen it all? Trying to police everything is exhausting. And accusing people of hiding something? Really? I'm a doctor, I have a lifetime of dealing with people's anxieties. Sometimes a little perspective is all anyone needs, even if it's a bit blunt. @global-dachshund, you wound me. Seriously.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Warning: @fat-superset, while I appreciate your expertise as a doctor, this is a forum, not a therapy session. Let's keep the focus on the topic and refrain from making personal comments or comparisons. If you have a point to make, please make it respectfully."

logs.name: yellow-goo
logs.text: Ugh, seriously?! Some people are just gonna drag everything through the mud, aren't they? I guess it's always gotta be about pointing fingers instead of actually trying to understand anything. @fat-superset, you're kinda being a jerk.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @yellow-goo, let's keep the discussion civil.

logs.name: matte-funnel
logs.text: Seriously? Bit much, isn't it? Seems like anyone who dares to offer a different perspective gets immediately labeled a jerk. I guess it's always about finding fault instead of trying to find common ground. @yellow-goo, I get your frustration, but calling someone out like that isn't really productive, is it?

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@yellow-goo, @matte-funnel, let's keep the discussion civil and focused on the topic. @yellow-goo, please refrain from making personal attacks. @matte-funnel, your point is noted, but let's avoid generalizing the behavior of others.

logs.name: yellow-goo
logs.text: Ugh, seriously?! Some people are just determined to be mean. It's not cool to jump to conclusions and call people names just because they don't think the same way. I guess I shouldn't be surprised by that. @matte-funnel you're right, it's kinda annoying.

logs.name: moderator
